home.storageUnavailable: Mnemo funciona mejor cuando el almacenamiento está disponible. Algunos navegadores lo bloquean en modo privado.
home.empty: Aún no hay nada aquí. Comienza con un pensamiento - algo que quisieras encontrar dentro de un año.

firstResurfacing.label: Primera reaparición
firstResurfacing.message_one: En {{count}} día, tu primer pensamiento regresará.
firstResurfacing.message_other: En {{count}} días, tu primer pensamiento regresará.
firstResurfacing.empty: Guarda tu primer pensamiento - regresará en 7 días.

dailyPrompt.label: Inspiración
prompts: What did you learn today that you'd want to remember?
What surprised you this week?
What would you want to find here a year from now?
What decision are you facing right now?
What are you afraid of losing?
What has changed in you recently?
What do you keep coming back to?
What did you almost say, but didn't?
What do you want to remember about today?
What is pulling your attention right now?
What belief of yours has shifted lately?
What would your future self thank you for noticing?
What is something you understood differently today?
What are you holding onto that you might need to release?
What made you feel most like yourself recently?
What question keeps coming back to you?
What do you know now that you didn't know a month ago?
What are you becoming?
What would you regret not writing down?
What is quietly true about your life right now?
What are you grateful for that you haven't said out loud?
What has been harder than you expected?
What has been easier than you expected?
What do you want to remember about this phase of your life?
What are you pretending not to know?
What small thing has mattered more than expected?
What conversation changed something in you?
What have you been avoiding thinking about?
What do you stand for right now?
What is the most honest thing you could write today?

capture.title: Nuevo fragmento
capture.saved: Guardado. Volverá cuando llegue su momento.

unsaved.title: Fragmento sin guardar
unsaved.message: Aún no has guardado este fragmento. ¿Lo guardas o escribes uno nuevo?

record.notSupported: La grabación de audio no es compatible con este navegador.
record.instruction: Toca el micrófono para grabar hasta 30 segundos.
record.transcriptHint: Edita la transcripción antes de guardar si es necesario.
record.transcriptEmpty: La transcripción no puede estar vacía.
record.transcriptionFailed: No se pudo transcribir. Inténtalo de nuevo.

archive.title: Archivo
archive.empty: Tu archivo está vacío. Cada fragmento que guardes vivirá aquí.

resurface.missing: Ese fragmento ya no está aquí.
resurface.explanation_one: Este fragmento ha reaparecido porque lo escribiste hace {{count}} día.
resurface.explanation_other: Este fragmento ha reaparecido porque lo escribiste hace {{count}} días.
resurface.notDueYet: Este fragmento aún no está listo para reaparecer.

fragmentItem.removeConfirm: ¿Eliminar este fragmento? No se puede deshacer.
